name: digital-book-of-india
description: Root package to manage all services

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run backend" "npm run frontend" "npm run admin" "npm run food-backend" "npm run food-frontend" "npm run food-admin"
scripts.install-all: concurrently "npm install" "npm install --prefix backend" "npm install --prefix frontend" "npm install --prefix admin" "npm install --prefix food-dashboard/backend" "npm install --prefix food-dashboard/frontend" "npm install --prefix food-dashboard/admin"
